name: Youth-Friendly SRHR Clinic
description: Safe, confidential, and judgment-free SRHR services for youth in Nairobi.

name: Kenya Mental Health Hotline
description: Free, 24/7 counseling and emotional support for all young people in Kenya.

name: Disability SRHR Support Networking
description: Connecting young people with disabilities to accessible SRHR information and resources.

name: National GBV Helpline
description: Immediate help for those experiencing gender-based violence or abuse.

name: Childline Kenya
description: Providing support and protection for children and teenagers across Kenya.

name: Marie Stopes Kenya
description: Comprehensive SRHR services, including family planning and safe abortion care.

name: Family Health Options Kenya (FHOK)
description: Youth-focused sexual and reproductive health clinics across the country.

name: LVCT Health
description: Testing and counseling for HIV and other STIs in a safe and supportive environment.

name: Red Cross Kenya
description: Emergency medical assistance and support during health crises.

name: Love Matters Kenya
description: Youth-friendly online platform for sex, love, and relationship information.

name: Nascop Kenya
description: National AIDS and STI Control Programme, providing resources and guidance.

name: Youth Alive! Kenya
description: Empowering youth to lead healthy and productive lives through advocacy and SRHR.

name: Kenya Network of Positive Youth
description: A network for young people living with HIV to share and support one another.

name: Amnesty International Kenya
description: Advocating for the human rights of all people, including reproductive rights and dignity.

name: Wote Sawa
description: Promoting the rights and well-being of young women and girls in Kenya.
